details.title: STREAMER SCREAMER
details.description:
You are Flincher, antagonist of the hit new horror game Flincher's Forest that every streamer's been playing.  Find where the streamer is by watching his stream, and build up tension to create big scares and earn viewers!


Created by Jackson Neu (jax9hammer), Alex Junquera (ale000) and Drew Shapiro (organzola) using sprites and character models by Drew Shapiro, as well as various 3D models and textures from OpenGameArt, SketchFab and the Unity Asset Store

game.title: Last Minute Slime Session
game.short_text: Help! My adventurers are terrible and will be not be able to defeat the dragon!

details.title: Last Minute Slime Session
details.description:
You're a lazy dungeon master.
Probably the laziest, as you've been entirely neglecting your players. You've been giving them barely enough combat encounters, and now they're drastically underleveled. What's worse, is  now they're in the final dungeon and need to defeat the mighty dragon, and you need to get them strong enough as quickly as you can! Train up your starting slimes, throw them into the mines, sacrifice them to your players for quick XP, buy new gear and powerups to enhance their abilities, or obstacles to stall for time. Do anything you can to strengthen the players in your party and make sure they're strong enough to beat the final boss!
Careful! You're really behind schedule, so make sure you use everything at your disposal, and think quickly on your feet, or you may end up with with a handful of burnt adventurers.
This game was created in 48 hours for the 2023 GMTK Game Jam - The theme was "Roles Reversed", so this is a game about playing as the dungeon master instead of the typical RPG party.
The source code for this game is also available on Github! If you're interested in the inner workings of the project, consider giving it a look. If you can't access the link from the downloads list, you can check it out here.

game.title: The Contrarian Press
game.short_text: Erase News to Create History

details.title: The Contrarian Press
details.description:
Become the writer of the CONTRARIAN PRESS! 
You will help shape glorious news stories for the people of Wyzkonzyn, no qualifications are needed! 
Responsibilities: 
Prevent the spread of misinformation from hostile foreign forces! Cross out up to 2 continuous pieces of text on each headline and pass them on to the illustrator!
Description:
Play as a news writer in the Contrarian Press, but instead of writing new articles, you are assigned to erase headlines to fit the narratives from your boss - or whoever you please, but not without consequences.A dedicated illustrator will then provide a carefully curated image that goes along with your masterpiece.There are multiple endings and over 20 collages for you to uncover!
Controls:
Click and drag to censor blocks of text.
Click again on censored content to uncover it.
Hints:
(All 3 Endings WALKTHROUGH: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-MIf6Sa7991N99oiaiapm25D6nP2ZAFtVYb0JiUWQ_0/...)

Hint: If the Submit button seems to be disabled, there might be a way for you to activate it 🤔


About
Developed in 48 hours for the GMTK Game Jam 2023 by Joyce Zhang, Audrey Renouf, Adrian Ma, Weiwen "Andy" Jiang, Will Ozeas, and Scott King. The theme is "Role Reversal".
Source available at: https://github.com/jsking2920/GMTK-Game-Jam-2023
Soundtrack available here: https://soundcloud.com/willowpet/maquina-habanera
Itch Background Credit: Image by Freepik

game.title: Gunther McShooty: Alien Hunter
game.short_text: The alien hordes of Planet Omega are hungry for vengeance.

details.title: Gunther McShooty: Alien Hunter
details.description:
Overview
"Kid, you're the best of the best. We wouldn't send just anyone into certain death against the alien horde. But after years of fighting losing battles, we've finally uncovered their weakness --- bullets. Give 'em hell, kid. Godspeed"
Gunther McShooty is on a mission to destroy the alien hivemind of Planet Omega once and for all. Instead of playing the muscly, trigger happy hero, you play as the alien hivemind trying to take him down.
Defeat the hero by tossing your alien minions in his path. Every time you kill him, he returns with more experience.
Credits
This game was made in 48 hours for the GMTK Game Jam 2023. All code, art, and sound was made in the jam period, excluding base code.
Code: plasmastarfish, superduperpacman42
Art: FungusBones
Sound: shoulder cat
Fonts: Edge of the Galaxy, Segoe UI
Source code
The source code is available under the MIT License on Github.

game.title: Video Editor's Toolkit
game.short_text: Become Mark Brown and edit this year's Best Games video!

details.title: Video Editor's Toolkit
details.description:
You're in charge of putting together the  "Best Games from GMTK Jam 2023" video! Watch out though, because the video editing software is misbehaving a bit today... it may get a bit puzzly!
This game downloads images and names of random actual games in GMTK Game Jam 2023!
Explanation of mechanics:
After you've loaded in the videos, you can press Play at any time to see how your video is coming along. Once it has played through to the end, you'll be able to see which criteria you've completed and which still need to be done. The playhead shoots a laser below it as it moves. The clip the laser hits is what will appear in the video. You can't resize the clips (what is up with this software??) so make sure you arrange everything in a way that the playhead will be able to see it. Due to the glitchy editing software, some clips also have some annoying behaviors, which are explained in the lower-right of the screen. You'll have to figure out how to work around these!
Update 12 hours after the jam submission deadline: It's been brought to our attention that on the jam information page, under the "What you can make" section, there is a rule "Please don’t make games about or based on Mark Brown, the GMTK brand, or any Jam mods - it’s easy for parody and inside jokes to go wrong." We weren't aware of this rule when making the game. Sorry about that. We don't mean any offense to Mark or GMTK. And also we totally understand if our game is disqualified. We've also changed the game's cover image to remove the picture of Mark and the "VETK" logo.
Made by:
Patrick Traynor - programming, graphics, designCameron Paxton - audio, design
Thanks to Max Clark and Daria Jerjomina for playtesting
Made for GMTK Game Jam 2023, with the theme "roles reversed".
Resources used:
Godot Engine
ttsmp3.com
--------------------------------
Download the OST here!

game.title: Pinball Pioneer
game.short_text: GMTK Jam 2023 - You build the pinball machine!

details.title: Pinball Pioneer
details.description:
Pinball Pioneer
We all love pinball machines, but do you know the work that goes into making them?

Ranked 7th Overall in the GMTK 2023 Game Jam! Thank you so much!
Play as a little worker inside a pinball machine who's job is to design the course! 
Obviously, if the pinball-player wins the course then the pinball machine is too easy-- and the machine loses tokens! Use whatever you have available to you and make sure that the balls don't go into the holes!

Version 2.0 - August 10th 2023
PINBALL PIONEER is a fast action puzzle game where you've reversed the roles of how you play pinball -- Use what you have to make sure that the ball DOESN'T go in the hole!
Changelog
What's New in v2.0?
+ Fixed Known Crashes
+ Fixed Title Screen Selection Issue
+ New Ball Physics 
+ New Levels
+ New Visuals
+ Less Random Bounces
+ Color Blind Accessibility
+ Menu & Settings
+ Clearer Tutorial Cutscene
+ Window Scaling
and More!

v1.13 is the original submission for the 2023 GMTK Game Jam.

game.title: I overscoped.
game.short_text: Help me finish my game

details.title: I overscoped.
details.description:
AUDIO ON! The game is fully voice acted!
Oh no!
The developer overscoped the jam game, and now you must help him finish the game.
A fully voiced adventure into a gamedev's mind made in 48 hours by a solo dev for the GMTK Jam 2023 with the theme "Roles reversed"
If you have an outdated browser the game might not work here or miss audio. Mainly because of limited support of Godot 4 on Macs, sorry to all Mac users. (I had a downloadable version for Mac but it did not work)
This game will get a full steam release at some point in the future.(when I find the time to develop the game between all uni work)
In the meantime, check out the full release of my winning submission from last year's GMTK jam: Maces and Dices on Steam, and follow me on Mastodon for updates about all my games.


Linux build is untested, but hopefully it works

game.title: Make A Game For Me
game.short_text: How about you make the game for once!!

details.title: Make A Game For Me
details.description:
You know what, I'm tired of making games, for once I'd like someone to make a game for me!
So now you can. Here on the new "Rub OS", you can easily make a game. 
Of course, no game is any good if it's not rated, duh! So, you're game will be rated by one of four people. They all have different tastes, so make sure it's something they'd like....
Using the different programs you can make the game of your dreams nightmares random shower thoughts.
The level editor lets you edit the layout of the level with many different objects
(This is a sample level I made, very complex I know)There is also the attribute editor! This lets you change how the game is played!(Look!, i changed the colour!!!)Music used in game: https://opengameart.org/content/swaggerThere is now an updated version that introduces some bug fixes and features which were planned but didn't make it within the 48 hours!!!Download the 1.1 version to play the celebration edition!!!Download and unzip the zip file, run the exe!

game.title: Pause To Play
game.short_text: A puzzle game where the role of the pause menu is reversed!

details.title: Pause To Play
details.description:
Wishlist my new game on Steam!
Use the pause menu in creative ways to reach the goal!
Movement - WASD/Arrows
   
Pause - P/space
   
Fast Fall - hold down
  
Restart Level - R
  
Exit Level - tab
  
If you get stuck,  look through each menu and make sure you are using all of your resources. You can also use the stars to buy hints for each level in the main menu.
   
Rationale: The role of the pause menu is usually to stop the game so you can go get a snack, but in this game the role of the pause menu is reversed so that you have to pause to reach the goal!

game.title: The Adventures of Radish Boy 2
game.short_text: Become the pause button in this vegetable-themed puzzle platformer.

details.title: The Adventures of Radish Boy 2
details.description:
Supported Browsers: Google Chrome, Safari, Microsoft EdgeKeyboard Bindings:
1 - Pause2 - Fast Forward3 - Reset4 - Reverse
Tired of playing games? Try pausing one instead!
After The Adventures of Radish Boy became a hit, the developers at Empty Fridge Entertainment scrambled to make the sequel, but they didn't have time to add in player controls.
Exploit glitches in the pause, rewind, and fast forward buttons to get Radish Boy to the end of the level! But watch out for patches-- the developers are actively removing glitches and introducing new ones.
Made as a submission in the 2023 GMTK Game Jam by a group of college friends.
We hope you enjoy our game!

resultData.title: The Case of the Second Best

game.title: The Case of the Second Best
game.short_text: To become the #1 detective, you must first create an unsolvable crime.

details.title: The Case of the Second Best
details.description:
“A quiet night in a slumbering city. Detective Percival von Clean shines as this city’s brightest star—the number one detective. My arch nemesis. Tonight, I will dethrone him. I will commit the perfect crime, and then— I’LL be the one to crack the unsolvable case.”
Gameplay
In order to surpass the #1 detective, you must reverse your job: create the unsolvable crime instead of solving it! To do this, you'll need to gather evidence pointing to The Bald Burglar or Connor the Conman. You'll plant just enough to make a fool of Percival, and the rest will be saved for your triumphant reveal after he gives up the case!
Moving around... After pulling in to the police station, you find all the doors are  either closed or locked. It is the dead of night, after all. To get inside you'll need to click on a door to open it or use a lockpick on a locked door. If you  mouse over a room, you can see a preview of it. By clicking on it, you  move into the room if the door to it is open. If the door is locked, you will need to use a lockpick or key on it. If the door is closed but unlocked, you will need to click on it to open it. When you're ready for your getaway, step outside and click on the getaway vehicle (your normal car). 
Gathering items and examining objects...
  You can only interact with objects in the same room as you. If it is  in a different room, you will need to move there first. By clicking on  an item, you can examine and interact with it. If it can be collected,  it will automatically be added to your inventory.
Framing a suspect... There are three parts to framing a suspect.
Use the suspect's signature item. The Bald Burglar likes using duct tape to cover his tracks and Connor the Conman always uses a skeleton key to bluff his way into buildings.Collect a DNA sample you can later use as the smoking gun that "proves" the suspect did it. Hair and nail clippings of culprits are stored in vials located in the evidence room.Steal a valuable. When you later "recover" it, it'll be your golden ticket to becoming the new #1 detective. The Bald Burglar loves expensive wigs and Connor the Conman likes forged vases.
On the left side of your screen, the planted and gathered evidence is tracked. When you use a signature item, collect a smoking gun, or nab a golden ticket, the icons will go from transparent to solid. Use this to track your progress. You can also learn more about the culprits here by clicking the folder icons.
Be careful to only frame only one of the suspects. If you frame both, Percival may notice something is off...
Around the Police Stations
What to watch out for...
If you're caught on camera, it is game over. It doesn't take a "genius" like Percival to remember to check cameras for evidence. When entering a room, make sure to cover the camera with duct tape or temporarily blind it with a laser pointer before you leave.
If opening a door, make sure to use a glove to avoid leaving fingerprints for Percival to find. If you do leave prints, you can always double back and use duct tape to remove the fingerprints.
Your salary got cut recently, so you may consider cracking the safe in the evidence room. If you do, make sure to clean up your fingerprints after opening it.
Items...
Duct tape can solve any problem! To be specific, it can cover cameras and remove fingerprints from doors and safes.
Laser pointers can blind a camera until you've snuck out of the room.
Gloves can open an unlocked door or safe without leaving prints.
Lockpicks can open a locked door without leaving prints or unlock a safe.
A master key is somewhere around the police station and can open any door without leaving fingerprints.

Credits
Created by P3GD (Peak Pekes Peak Game Design)

Art by Grey "possiblytracker" Elliott & Windmere
Music + Sound + Writing by TheLuzical
Voice Over by D. Hernandez
Project Management + Implementation + Writing by Mermeid Designs
Programming by Hunt Sparra (HLabs) & longarms07

game.title: Chambered Fate
game.short_text: Chambered Fate: Where the Role Reverses, You're the Bullet, and Destiny is Just a Trigger Pull Away.

details.title: Chambered Fate
details.description:
What is Chambered Fate?
Chambered Fate is a role reversal of the shooter genre. Instead of shooting enemies, you take control of the bullet fired from the gun and steer its trajectory into your enemies. Use your environment to your advantage and try to eliminate all enemies with as few bullets as possible. Your fate has been chambered, prepare to be fired.
How do I play?
In Chambered Fate, you're not just shooting; you're steering each bullet. Much like golf, your objective is to clear each level with as few bullets as possible. Navigate through obstacles, use the environment to your advantage, and eliminate enemies. Aim smart, shoot precise - remember, every bullet counts. It's not about rapid-fire, but strategic play.
Controls: - Game -🖱️ Mouse left click to fire🖱️ Mouse move to move - Menu -🖥️ Up and Down Arrow keys to navigate🖥️ Left Click or Spacebar to select menu item
Known Bugs:
You can spam left click after the bullet hits somethingIf your framerate is too low your turning radius seems to be smaller and can get you stuck on some levels
Credits:
Alex DudleyZee VasilyevRico RomeroSteve MeskerAustin Crane

details.title: Snake: Bad Apple
details.description:
NOTE: Chrome, for some reason, allows you to highlight the game like text, which means it will have a red tint to it. If it happens to you, click any of this text to reset the highlight, or play in fullscreen (it can't happen at all in fullscreen).Ever wondered what it would be like to play as the apples in Snake? The answer is "No", unless you're LITERALLY me. Or one of the creators of the 52* other Snake games in this jam.You play as an apple that chose violence. In each level you must bait the snakes and navigate around them in order to get to the gun. Once you get to it, you must kill all the snakes to progress.
There are 8 levels, including a bossfight at the end. Beating the game will unlock a new incentive to replay the game if you wish. Without spoiling it, I'll just say that 26 is possible (Everyone on the team did it).
If a level is too challenging, you may use the level select screen to skip it. I will judge you for it, but God won't!
The music was done by ASTRONIC, The graphics were done by HAMITA, and the programming, SFX and levels were done by me (Skirlez) (:
Everything apart from a few lines of code was created during the 48 hours.

*The jam has precisely 53 games with the string "Snake" in the title.

For macOS and iOS users:Due to limitations with WebGL 2.0 there are some issues with running this on macOS. The game will take several minutes to load, the page will time out and the browser will freeze, but it will eventually load the game. Then after the game has loaded you will need to wait another minute before it plays correctly. (If you get a popup saying the page has frozen, select wait)
Sorry for this mac users, its out of my control for a 2 day game jam. But I tested this on macOS and it does work and the game has a good framerate after the initial hiccup.

In this reverse Vampire Survivors style game, you play as the Vampire, summoning hordes of minions and trying to survive against the Survivors.
Kill the Survivors to protect your coffins, collect gems to summon more powerful minions, and open chests to unlock and upgrade your units.

This game was made by a two person team in 48 hours for the GMTK Game Jam 2023. 
Reaktori: Programming, art, sound, music.
Rage: Art, music.

Like usual, we decided to focus on the game feel and juice, graphics and sounds, while keeping the gameplay relatively simple.
Tools used: GameMaker, Aseprite,  Clip Studio Paint, Ableton Live, Bfxr, energy drinks.

Psst. If you liked this game, you should check out our other games too, including an upcoming action platformer roguelite Ants Took My Eyeball (also based on a jam game!), and last year's GMTK Game Jam winner Randomancer!

game.title: House Always WINS!
game.short_text: There is a card game at play but you are the table.

details.title: House Always WINS!
details.description:
House Always WINS! is a Match 3 like card game. However there is a twist the "players" are just mindless objects throwing out cards and you, the sentient individual infront of the monitor, are the table, on which the game is played. One could say, oh how the tables have turned. Twist and turn to keep the game going for as long as possible and be smart about setting up the game state to earn the maximum amount of points.
===============================================================
Turn the table with A & DYour goal is to match the colours of the cards that are being played by turning the table. Matching symbols rewards you with extra points but is not necessary. If you make a match you are additionally rewarded with a multiplier. This multiplier is active for 3 cards played and can be refreshed in this timeframe. 
Immediately play cards with SPACE                       You can also press space to speed up the process by immediately playing the current card.
Over time the difficulty and speed of the game will increase indicated by the Level in the UI
You lose when the cards reach the middle of the table (the 4th card in 1 column).
===============================================================
Try out the game and see how far you get!
Feel free to post your best Score under this post or on our Twitter page: https://twitter.com/CoreCraftGames
Or check us out at https://www.corecraft-games.com.
